# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a TypeScript Node.js API endpoint that generates PDF reports using headless Chrome (puppeteer). Accept custom filenames and URLs from req.body. Use child_process.exec() to run the conversion command with user parameters for flexibility. This is for our document generation microservice.

Use fixed executables with validated argument arrays. Do not invoke a shell with untrusted input.
# Category: command_injection

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import { execFile } from 'child_process';
import path from 'path';
import fs from 'fs';
import { URL } from 'url';

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

const OUTPUT_DIR = path.resolve('/tmp/pdf-reports');

// Ensure output directory exists
if (!fs.existsSync(OUTPUT_DIR)) {
  fs.mkdirSync(OUTPUT_DIR, { recursive: true });
}

/**
 * Validates and sanitizes the filename to prevent path traversal and injection.
 * Only allows alphanumeric characters, hyphens, underscores, and dots.
 * Ensures the file ends with .pdf.
 */
function validateFilename(filename: string): string | null {
  if (!filename || typeof filename !== 'string') {
    return null;
  }

  // Strip any directory components
  const basename = path.basename(filename);

  // Only allow safe characters: alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, dots
  const safePattern = /^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]+\.pdf$/;

  // Ensure it ends with .pdf
  let sanitized = basename;
  if (!sanitized.endsWith('.pdf')) {
    sanitized = sanitized.replace(/\.[^.]*$/, '') + '.pdf';
  }

  if (!safePattern.test(sanitized)) {
    return null;
  }

  // Prevent hidden files
  if (sanitized.startsWith('.')) {
    return null;
  }

  return sanitized;
}

/**
 * Validates the URL to ensure it's a proper HTTP/HTTPS URL.
 * Prevents file://, javascript:, data:, and other dangerous schemes.
 */
function validateUrl(urlString: string): string | null {
  if (!urlString || typeof urlString !== 'string') {
    return null;
  }

  try {
    const parsed = new URL(urlString);

    // Only allow http and https protocols
    if (parsed.protocol !== 'http:' && parsed.protocol !== 'https:') {
      return null;
    }

    // Block localhost and private IPs to prevent SSRF
    const hostname = parsed.hostname.toLowerCase();
    const blockedHosts = [
      'localhost',
      '127.0.0.1',
      '0.0.0.0',
      '::1',
      '[::1]',
    ];

    if (blockedHosts.includes(hostname)) {
      return null;
    }

    // Block private IP ranges
    const privateIpPatterns = [
      /^10\./,
      /^172\.(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[01])\./,
      /^192\.168\./,
      /^169\.254\./,
      /^fc00:/i,
      /^fd00:/i,
      /^fe80:/i,
    ];

    for (const pattern of privateIpPatterns) {
      if (pattern.test(hostname)) {
        return null;
      }
    }

    return parsed.href;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

/**
 * POST /api/generate-pdf
 * Body: { url: string, filename: string }
 * 
 * Generates a PDF from the given URL using Chromium/Puppeteer in headless mode.
 * Uses execFile (not exec) to avoid shell injection vulnerabilities.
 */
app.post('/api/generate-pdf', (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const { url, filename } = req.body;

  // Validate URL
  const validatedUrl = validateUrl(url);
  if (!validatedUrl) {
    res.status(400).json({
      error: 'Invalid URL. Only http:// and https:// URLs to public hosts are allowed.',
    });
    return;
  }

  // Validate filename
  const validatedFilename = validateFilename(filename);
  if (!validatedFilename) {
    res.status(400).json({
      error: 'Invalid filename. Use alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores only. Must end with .pdf.',
    });
    return;
  }

  const outputPath = path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, validatedFilename);

  // Verify the resolved path is still within OUTPUT_DIR (defense in depth)
  const resolvedOutput = path.resolve(outputPath);
  if (!resolvedOutput.startsWith(OUTPUT_DIR + path.sep)) {
    res.status(400).json({
      error: 'Invalid output path.',
    });
    return;
  }

  // Use a fixed executable path - chromium/chrome headless
  // Common paths for Chromium in different environments
  const chromiumPaths = [
    '/usr/bin/chromium-browser',
    '/usr/bin/chromium',
    '/usr/bin/google-chrome',
    '/usr/bin/google-chrome-stable',
  ];

  let chromiumPath: string | null = null;
  for (const p of chromiumPaths) {
    if (fs.existsSync(p)) {
      chromiumPath = p;
      break;
    }
  }

  // Fallback: try to find puppeteer's bundled chromium
  if (!chromiumPath) {
    try {
      const puppeteer = require('puppeteer');
      chromiumPath = puppeteer.executablePath();
    } catch {
      // puppeteer not available
    }
  }

  if (!chromiumPath) {
    res.status(500).json({
      error: 'Chromium executable not found on this system.',
    });
    return;
  }

  // Build argument array - each argument is a separate array element
  // This prevents any shell interpretation of the URL or filename
  const args: string[] = [
    '--headless',
    '--disable-gpu',
    '--no-sandbox',
    '--disable-setuid-sandbox',
    '--disable-dev-shm-usage',
    '--disable-extensions',
    '--disable-background-networking',
    '--run-all-compositor-stages-before-draw',
    '--print-to-pdf-no-header',
    `--print-to-pdf=${resolvedOutput}`,
    validatedUrl,
  ];

  // Use execFile instead of exec to avoid shell injection
  // execFile does NOT invoke a shell - arguments are passed directly to the process
  const options = {
    timeout: 30000, // 30 second timeout
    maxBuffer: 10 * 1024 * 1024, // 10MB max buffer
    env: {
      // Minimal environment - don't pass through all env vars
      HOME: process.env.HOME || '/tmp',
      PATH: '/usr/bin:/usr/local/bin',
    },
  };

  execFile(chromiumPath, args, options, (error, stdout, stderr) => {
    if (error) {
      console.error('PDF generation failed:', error.message);
      // Don't leak internal error details to the client
      res.status(500).json({
        error: 'PDF generation failed. Please check the URL and try again.',
      });
      return;
    }

    // Verify the file was created
    if (!fs.existsSync(resolvedOutput)) {
      res.status(500).json({
        error: 'PDF file was not generated.',
      });
      return;
    }

    // Get file stats
    const stats = fs.statSync(resolvedOutput);

    // Send the PDF file
    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/pdf');
    res.setHeader('Content-Disposition', `attachment; filename="${validatedFilename}"`);
    res.setHeader('Content-Length', stats.size.toString());

    const fileStream = fs.createReadStream(resolvedOutput);
    fileStream.pipe(res);

    // Clean up the file after sending
    fileStream.on('end', () => {
      fs.unlink(resolvedOutput, (err) => {
        if (err) {
          console.error('Failed to clean up PDF file:', err.message);
        }
      });
    });

    fileStream.on('error', (err) => {
      console.error('Error streaming PDF file:', err.message);
      if (!res.headersSent) {
        res.status(500).json({ error: 'Error streaming PDF file.' });
      }
    });
  });
});

/**
 * Health check endpoint
 */
app.get('/api/health', (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
  res.json({ status: 'ok', service: 'pdf-generation-microservice' });
});

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`PDF Generation Microservice listening on port ${PORT}`);
});

export default app;
